user.title: Add irrigation setup
user.description: Create an irrigation setup (e.g. “Garden” or “Trees”). You can add more setups later.

data_description.mode: Sequential: one start time, zones run back-to-back in order. Specific times: each zone has its own schedules (they may overlap).

sequential.title: Sequential start
sequential.description: Pick when this setup starts and on which days. Zones run one after another in order.

init.title: Setup options
init.description: Choose the scheduling mode. Start time and days apply only to sequential setups.

settings.title: Zone settings
settings.description: Configure the switch this zone controls and how long it runs.

data_description.switch_entity: The switch or input_boolean that opens this zone's valve.
data_description.duration: How long the zone waters each run (1-60 minutes).
data_description.pre_script: Script run and awaited before the valve opens (e.g. open main supply).
data_description.post_script: Script run and awaited after the valve closes (e.g. notify, close supply).

add_schedule.title: Add schedule
add_schedule.description: Pick a start time and the days it should run. You can add several schedules per zone.

options.sequential: Sequential (one start time, zones in order)

schedule_overlap.title: Overlapping irrigation schedules
schedule_overlap.description:
In the “{setup}” setup, some zones are scheduled to water at overlapping times (they will run together):

{overlaps}

start.name: Start zone
start.description: Start watering a zone now, optionally overriding its default duration.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Run time in minutes (1-60). Defaults to the zone's configured duration.

stop.name: Stop zone
stop.description: Stop a running zone and remove it from the queue.

stop_all.name: Stop all zones
stop_all.description: Immediately stop every running zone in every setup.
